title: melanchrysum pavonium
intro: Melanchrysum pavonium, also known as tree of sorrow, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Melanchrysum pavonium include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Melanchrysum pavonium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and soothe the nervous system.
